headline: The Bull Case For Automatic Data Processing (ADP) Could Change Following Guggenheim’s Initiation And Mixed Hiring Signals
summary: Guggenheim recently initiated coverage on Automatic Data Processing (ADP) with a Buy rating, highlighting the company’s diversified HCM business and management’s upgraded fiscal 2026 revenue and adjusted EPS growth guidance. At the same time, ADP’s own high-frequency NER Pulse data showed hiring momentum easing in late February, while insider selling continued with no offsetting insider purchases over the past year, offering a mixed picture of external confidence and internal...
